name: Quick Spanish Style Dressing
recipeIngredient: AM Oat Bran Muffin Mix (Wheat Free)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the Quick Brown Rice according to directions for 12 minutes. Remove from heat.
2. Stir in the enchilada sauce.
3. Add 1 1/4 cup water and the dry Oat Bran Muffin Mix. Stir.
4. Pour into a well-oiled 9-inch x 13-inch cake pan.
5. Bake at 300°F for 25 to 30 minutes or to desired doneness.
VARIATION: A beaten egg added to the uncooked mixture will produce a lighter dressing.
